transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: Concrete consumption scenarios, an origin anecdote, and a recurring explanatory model provide coherence, but relentless promises, commands, and restatements prolong the argument before a boilerplate summary.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Individually readable sentences arrive in disrupted order, severing explanations from examples, placing conclusions before premises, and ending by retreating into introductory material.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Preserved causal sequencing lets setup, illustration, and instruction accumulate; scrambled sequencing turns locally intelligible sentences into discontinuous fragments without rhetorical payoff.

paraphrased_evidence.ours: Individually readable sentences arrive in disrupted order, severing explanations from examples, placing conclusions before premises, and ending by retreating into introductory material.
paraphrased_evidence.ref: Concrete consumption scenarios, an origin anecdote, and a recurring explanatory model provide coherence, but relentless promises, commands, and restatements prolong the argument before a boilerplate summary.
